brief: Biggest watchlist movers: BLZE +43.6%, MU -13.18%, ARM -10.14%. Oversold-in-uptrend signals: AAPL, NVDA, AMZN, AVGO, XOM, RKLB, FSLR, NXT, IONQ, LUNR, RDW, BKSY, AUR, CRNC. Overbought (pullback risk): JPM, BAC, GE, PGR, VRTX, DUOL, BROS, ELF. Check 8-K filings for any leadership/material events. Signals are heuristics, not advice.
